creator: olgeni@uli.it
text:
There is a new version of the mnesia library which addresses a few problems.

The proposed patch updates the erlang port to include the new release of the
library and its documentation.

Fix: This patch updates the port from mnesia-3.8.2 to mnesia-3.8.5 (plus docs).

Note:

* The documentation install script is somewhat ugly :-/, I'm sure
there's a better way to do it.

* I'm not sure about which version number should go in PORTVERSION.
How-To-Repeat: 
N/A
